title: Oil Prices Set for More Volatility After Latest Iranian Attack in Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Crude oil prices jumped above prewar levels this week, demonstrating Iran’s capacity to move energy prices by projecting power in the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Crude oil prices jumped above prewar levels this week, demonstrating Iran’s capacity to move energy prices by projecting power in the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: negative
